display.purpose: Homepage hero and major landing headings only.

headline.purpose: Section titles on catalog and course pages.

body.purpose: Lesson content, descriptions, form labels. Max 65–75ch in prose.

mono.purpose: Wallet addresses, code snippets, technical identifiers.

shadows.name: structural
shadows.purpose: Cards, inputs, primary buttons at rest.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition-all on buttons and interactive elements.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action for learner flows and marketing CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.625rem 1rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.99 0.01 280); background: oklch(0.52 0.21 280); border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, opacity 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.47 0.21 280); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.52 0.21 280 / 0.4); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Navigation links and secondary actions in header.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.21 0.02 264); background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.03 280); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.52 0.21 280 / 0.4); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Course cards, product cards, admin panels.
components.html:
Introduction to Arcium

A beginner-friendly overview of privacy-preserving computation.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 1.5rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.21 0.02 264); border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.005 264); border-radius: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.52 0.02 264); margin: 0.375rem 0 0; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form fields in admin and partner consoles.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.21 0.02 264); background: oklch(0.99 0.003 264); border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.005 264); border-radius: 0.625rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.52 0.02 264); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.52 0.21 280); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.52 0.21 280 / 0.4); }

components.name: Site Header
components.description: Sticky top navigation with logo, links, and wallet auth.
components.html:
Arcademy
CoursesEcosystem Projects
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 4rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; background: oklch(0.99 0.003 264 / 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.005 264); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-header-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.21 0.02 264); text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.015em; } .ds-header-mark { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2rem; height: 2rem; background: oklch(0.52 0.21 280); color: oklch(0.99 0.01 280); border-radius: 0.625rem; } .ds-header-nav { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-header-nav a { padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.21 0.02 264); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-header-nav a:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.03 280); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Official platform tag and course level indicators.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.99 0.01 280); background: oklch(0.52 0.21 280); border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Course Card
components.description: Featured course tile on homepage and catalog.
components.html:
Beginner · 45 min

Getting Started with Arcium

Learn the core concepts in plain language.
components.css: .ds-course-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.005 264); border-radius: 1rem; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-course-card:hover { border-color: oklch(0.52 0.21 280 / 0.3); } .ds-course-thumb { height: 8rem; background: oklch(0.95 0.03 280); } .ds-course-body { padding: 1.25rem; } .ds-course-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.52 0.02 264); } .ds-course-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0.25rem 0 0; color: oklch(0.21 0.02 264); } .ds-course-summary { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.52 0.02 264); margin: 0.375rem 0 0; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview: Arcademy looks and feels like an official institution for ecosystem learning: calm surfaces, violet-indigo brand accents used with restraint, and typography that prioritizes readability over display flair. The UI serves learning workflows rather than selling hype. Depth comes from tonal layering and subtle borders, not dramatic shadows or glass effects.
keyCharacteristics: Soft neutral canvas with cool-violet tint
Single sans family (Geist) with weight contrast for hierarchy
Primary violet used for CTAs and brand moments at ≤15% of any screen
Rounded corners capped at 12–16px on cards
Visible progress and status at every step of the learner journey

rules.name: The Restrained Accent Rule
rules.body: Primary violet appears on CTAs, the logo mark, active nav, progress bars, and one focal element per section. It never floods backgrounds or body text blocks.

rules.name: The Plain Language Rule
rules.body: Typography supports scannability: short headings, generous line height on body copy, text-wrap balance on h1–h3. No all-caps body copy.

rules.name: The No Ghost Card Rule
rules.body: Do not pair border 1px solid with wide soft shadows (blur ≥16px). Pick border OR a tight shadow, not both as decoration.

dos: Do use OKLCH tokens from globals.css for all new surfaces and states
Do keep primary violet on CTAs, progress, and one focal element per view
Do show learner progress explicitly (lesson checklist, quiz score, badge award)
Do write button labels as verb + object (Browse courses, Save changes)
Do align visual tone with Arcium's official brand identity
donts: Don't use crypto hype visuals: neon gradients, moon memes, degen energy, loud Web3 marketing
Don't default to developer-docs aesthetics: dense monospace body, API-reference layout, insider jargon in UI copy
Don't adopt corporate enterprise polish: navy-and-gold schemes, stock-photo trust badges, enterprise-grade filler
Don't use generic SaaS templates: hero metrics, identical icon-card grids, numbered section eyebrows (01/02/03)
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe borders, or glassmorphism as decoration
Don't exceed 12–16px border-radius on cards or round inputs past pill territory
Don't pair 1px borders with wide soft drop shadows on the same element
